requirement_topic.en: EMC and Radio Interface for Cordless Power Tools
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无绳电动工具无线接口
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容與無繩電動工具無線介面

summary.en: Morocco expects EMC adequacy to be demonstrated as part of the IMANOR NM-aligned conformity evidence used in the Ministry of Industry import-conformity route. For cordless tools with radio functions, there is an additional ANRT approval path for the radio module at market placement, separate from baseline electrical safety evidence.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥要求将电磁兼容适合性作为IMANOR NM对齐证据的一部分，在工业部进口符合性流程中由进口商提交。具备无线功能的无绳工具还需走ANRT无线模块核准路径，该义务与基础电气安全证据分开存在。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥要求將電磁相容適合性作為IMANOR NM對齊證據的一部分，在工業部進口符合性流程中由進口商提交。具備無線功能的無繩工具還需走ANRT無線模組核准路徑，該義務與基礎電氣安全證據分開存在。

standards_or_laws: IMANOR NM standard-aligned electrical/electromagnetic evidence for power tools
Ministry of Industry import-conformity process and supporting technical dossier
ANRT approval route for cordless tools with radio modules

summary.en: Chinese export files often include EMC testing and radio-module filing (for example SRRC-type procedures) alongside GB/T 3883-based safety evidence. This is useful, but it does not automatically satisfy Moroccan import-conformity and ANRT expectations.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件常附带EMC测试和无线模块报批（如SRRC相关）并伴随GB/T 3883安全证据。此类资料有参考价值，但不能自动满足摩洛哥进口符合性和ANRT要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件常附帶EMC測試和無線模組報批（如SRRC相關）並伴隨GB/T 3883安全證據。此類資料有參考價值，但不能自動滿足摩洛哥進口符合性和ANRT要求。

standards_or_laws: China radio procedures for cordless equipment where applicable

gap.en: The common gap is configuration and scope: a Chinese report that omits actual Moroccan sale configurations (including battery module variants, control modules, and charger variants) or assumes SRRC filing is sufficient for ANRT will not close Moroccan entry expectations.
gap.zh: 常见差距在于配置与范围：如果中国报告未覆盖摩洛哥实际销售配置（含电池模块、控制模块、充电器型号变体），或将SRRC备案视为ANRT充分证明，通常不能通过摩洛哥入场审查。
gap.zht: 常見差距在於配置與範圍：如果中國報告未覆蓋摩洛哥實際銷售配置（含電池模組、控制模組、充電器型號變體），或將SRRC備案視為ANRT充分證明，通常不能通過摩洛哥入場審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where products are in scope under the Ministry of Industry import-conformity route for regulated tools; ANRT module approval is mandatory for cordless products with radio functions.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CN market-ready EMC documentation in applicable safety and radio-control contexts.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Chinese EMC and radio documentation as technical inputs only. Morocco requires the configuration matching, ANRT route for radio-equipped cordless tools, and the import-conformity evidence chain through the local importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 请将中国EMC及无线资料视为技术输入。摩洛哥要求按实际配置提供ANRT路径（适用有无线功能工具）并通过当地进口商完成进口符合性证据链。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 請將中國EMC及無線資料視為技術輸入。摩洛哥要求按實際配置提供ANRT路徑（適用有無線功能工具）並透過當地進口商完成進口符合性證據鏈。
